sourceMovie.title: Die Hard 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Die Hard 2 (1990) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Die Hard
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Die Hard 2 clicked for you, Die Hard (1988) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Die Hard 2 clicked for you, The Bourne Ultimatum (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Die Hard 2?
faq.answer: Try Die Hard, The Bourne Ultimatum, True Lies—each shares DNA with Die Hard 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Die Hard 2?
faq.answer: Die Hard 2 (1990) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Die Hard 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Die Hard Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
